design_notes: The chart is designed for casual play, utilizing a very clean, rhythmic 2-beat spacing that aligns perfectly with the melodic lead and drum accents. The lane shifts mirror the rising and falling pitch of the synthwave lead, creating a natural physical wave (GAP-BAR-NOTE on rising phrases, NOTE-BAR-GAP on falling phrases). Three comfortably spaced hold notes are introduced at key energy peaks (beats 20, 36, and 43), ensuring we hit the exact 15% hold note target without ever overloading the casual player's coordination.

sections.name: S0
sections.intent: Introduce the wave-like melodic movement and comfortable 2-beat rhythm flow.
